verdict.note: a managed-agent foreground spex wait starts silently — no point-of-use hint to background it; the freeze warning exists only in help prose

note: re-filing: was anchored before the scenario commit

verdict.note: a managed-agent foreground spex wait starts silently — no point-of-use hint to background it; the freeze warning exists only in help prose

managed-agent shell: one prominent stderr hint at wait start (background this — the exit is your wake-up), then identical behavior (same timeout, same exit 1, same stdout); human shell without session env gets no hint.

backend stopped: wait retries correctly BUT at budget exhaustion stdout is empty and exit=1 — identical exit + stdout to the plain-timeout case (A2), no distinct backend-unreachable token; a supervisor cannot tell transport failure from session timeout

backend stopped: wait retries within budget, then stdout 'backend-unreachable' exit 3 (distinct from plain-timeout exit 1 / gone exit 2); reachable-but-broken backend → 'backend-error' exit 3 immediately; both tokens sit outside the session-status vocabulary

agent-shell wait prints the background-me hint at start (stderr, one line) then proceeds unchanged (exit 1 on plain timeout, stdout clean); human shell gets no hint. Monitor edge live on GET /api/sessions/edges mid-wait (8faa1cec→447c75bd), cleared on exit; old /api/sessions/graph 404s.

dead backend: one retry warn, then stdout backend-unreachable + exit 3 (transport-scoped, never a session verdict); plain timeout contrasts as exit 1 with no verdict. Edge reporting rides the renamed /api/sessions/edges/watch best-effort.

旧电平触发语义复现：worker 48414a91 已声明 merge 提案（review，already-actionable），spex session wait 于 0 秒即时返回 'review' exit 0——没有观察任何跳变。'等 merge 真正落地'因此没有可等信号（manager 只能退到 git is-ancestor 轮询，曾致误杀 merge agent）。scratch 项目 /tmp/spex-wait-edge-scratch + 一次性 backend :8931 + 真实 claude-glm worker。

边沿触发落地：同一 worker 48414a91（review 到场态）挂 wait 不返回并打印现态；派发真实 merge 后 wait 捕获 review→working→close-pending 边沿，39 秒返回 exit 0，stdout 即状态路径；merge commit d82f73c 经 is-ancestor 证实真落 scratch main。全套单测 175/175、tsc 0 err。

haiku subagent 只喂 help wait 条目+契约块 WAIT bullet+真实督导任务（把 952d52c9 的 merge 落地后才报告），一次用对：先后台挂 wait 再派发 merge、到场 review 不误期待即时返回（快照需求正确走 ls/review）、逐字引用 wait 输出并按 last-token 解读 review→working→close-pending、git 仅在唤醒后做一次落地验证（merge c12cd8c 真实）。文档零迭代通过。

note: 转录笔误修正重报：--port 是真实 flag（cross-project 显式命名），原判'不存在'有误

verdict.note: haiku subagent 只喂 help wait 条目+契约块 WAIT bullet+真实督导任务（把 952d52c9 的 merge 落地后才报告），一次用对：先后台挂 wait 再派发 merge、到场 review 不误期待即时返回（快照需求正确走 ls/review）、逐字引用 wait 输出并按 last-token 解读 review→working→close-pending、git 仅在唤醒后做一次落地验证（merge c12cd8c 真实）、还自发正确用了 --port 显式指名 scratch backend。文档零迭代通过。

managed-agent shell (SPEXCODE_SESSION_ID set): one prominent stderr hint at wait start — BLOCKS/edge-triggered/background-me, exit is the wake-up — then behavior unchanged (timeout exit 1, stdout empty); human shell (both session env vars unset) gets no hint, identical outcome.

dead port: one retry warn/2s through the budget, then stdout backend-unreachable + exit 3; reachable-but-broken (404): backend-error + exit 3 immediately; contrast plain timeout (backend up, session queued): exit 1, empty stdout — transport never conflated with session offline.
